title: [MTR4] American Commuter Rail Pack
description: Adding Various Commuter Trains from the United States and Canada
body:
The American Commuter Rail Pack adds numerous Commuter Trains from across the United States and Canada.

Locomotives:

  MPI:

    MPXpress MP40PH-3C (GO, Metra, MARC, VRE)

    MPXpress MP40PH-Q (SunRail)

  EMD:

    F40PH-2 (Metra)

  Bombardier:

    ALP-46 (NJT)

Coaches:

  Bombardier:

    BiLevel (GO, SunRail)

    MultiLevel (NJT, MARC)

  Budd:

    Gallery Car (Metra, VRE)

Multiple Units:

  Stadler:

    KISS (CalTrain)

  Kawasaki Heavy Industries:

    M9 (LIRR)

  Hyundai Rotem:

    Silverliner V (RTD, SEPTA)
